summary: Live PR inventory shard classified conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are planned: instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled, and the listed PRs are independent work items rather than a shared dedupe family.

actions.reason: Focused, proof-backed PR appears viable but requires maintainer technical review; automation cannot merge or repair it in this job.
Independent PR needing proof and technical review; not a duplicate, superseded item, or low-signal close candidate under this job.
Message-delivery behavior change with passing proof still needs maintainer correctness judgment; no mutation is available in this job.
Active author follow-up and a P1 message-delivery/session-state fix require maintainer review; not eligible for closure or merge automation.
Useful but broad config feature PR requires maintainer product and technical review; no executable mutation is allowed.
Substantial gateway behavior change with green proof/checks needs maintainer technical review; merge and fix actions are blocked by the job.
Independent small PR with failed proof and prior bot finding; keep open for proof/review rather than close under disabled low-signal policy.
Actionable Codex review-bot P1 finding and failing relevant checks require human/author follow-up; no fix path is allowed in this job.
Known correctness blockers from bot reviews and failing checks make this a maintainer/author repair item; this job cannot fix or close it.
Independent performance PR with failing relevant checks; keep open for proof/repair rather than close or escalate the whole cluster.
